name: boundline-global-assistant-bootstrap
description: User-scoped assistant bootstrap commands for Boundline before workspace initialization.
host_support_scope: host_support encodes bootstrap install mode only; support_modes encodes repo-local parity or fallback expectations

support_mode_notes.claude: Repository-managed command assets expose the shared Boundline session workflow and delight follow-through surfaces directly.
support_mode_notes.codex: Repository-managed command assets expose the shared Boundline session workflow and delight follow-through surfaces directly.
support_mode_notes.cursor: Cursor remains in copy-ready-assets support mode: bootstrap assets are copy-ready, local installation details stay environment-specific, and the CLI remains authoritative.
support_mode_notes.copilot: Repository-managed prompt assets expose the Boundline delight surface directly even though global bootstrap installation remains a manual fallback.
support_mode_notes.antigravity: Antigravity now bootstraps a repo-local command pack through `boundline init --assistant antigravity` and refreshes it through `boundline update --workspace <workspace> --target assistant --apply`, while user-global bootstrap installation remains an explicit manual fallback.
